channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: *continues to predict the price of BTC in your path* All you had to do was buy on green and sell on red, at least we're… — 98 replies — 392.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
*continues to predict the price of BTC in your path* All you had to do was buy on green and sell on red, at least we're…

Open thread • Replies: 98 • Updated: 2026-06-03 18:50 UTC

OP

*continues to predict the price of BTC in your path*

All you had to do was buy on green and sell on red, at least we're close to a buy signal now

prev thread:
>>62261213

Early replies (first 3)

62284885
How do I use this?

62284969
>>62284885
green = buy dips
red = sell rips
yellow = volatility likely, derisk
the site has a realtime FX-based confirmation layer - positive confirms buys and invalidates sells, negative confirms sells and invalidates buys
today FX is solidly green so early buys are defensible
chart gets updated every month with a new 4-week, next will be on Sunday

62284994
imagine buying bitcoin over 70K

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62293559
>>62293541
>How do I get the meme lines for myself.
I'll post them in here, but there's also a live dashboard and a twitter, where a follow/likes would be greatly appreciated
>>62285878

62293571
>>62293559
Thanks for doing the needful sir. I'll be checking this out. Big ups anon.

62293619
>>62292730
Does the trading bot have contingencies in place just in case other trading bots start countertrading your strategy if it ends up being too successful?

62293680
>>62293619
I think if someone else's trading bot can move BTC by a few percent per day then we all have much bigger problems

62294595
>>62284814
Just buy the dip and sell the high simple. The main thing is to hold. I'm not only holding, I also staked some of my BTC recently since we can do that now without bridge involved.

62296711
BEHOLD, THE FUTURE

62296738
>>62296711

62297476
AAAAAAAAAAAAAA

62298184
>>62296711
Is that you Michael?

62298251
>>62284814
>buy signal
>5/28
This aged like milk.

62299491
>>62298251
>can't read
Maybe investing is not for you anon

>>62298184
Shhh it's a secret

62301262
>>62292563
>>62292730
what's a hyperliquid vault

62301440
>tfw if I listened to the schizo chart I would be down 10%

62301542
All i can see is that you've been incorrect? Am i missing something? Lol

62302104
>>62301542
>>62301440
We'll see - the hit rate's 78%, not 100%. The general sense, per the twitter thread yesterday, is bounce to the 5th-7th, then drop to the real bottom mid-June and then pump through summer, but obviously Brownian motion can't predict Saylor selling lol

62303698
Tell me no one bought because of this indicator please HAHAHAHAHA

62303805
Is this some intraday trading indicator? Like you were supposed to buy and then sell with leverage the day of the OP? If you would have bought and were holding now you would be fucked

62304332
reverse indicator of op is printing me money

62305278
Look how they massacred my coin

62305335
>>62296711
I appreciate the insight. This thread has been an interesting read.

62305363
>>62305335
Thanks Anon, wish it was going better right now though!
Liquidity's good, the sim says "increasing demand," sure enough stocks are up and copper/gold is acting like a boom is coming, but crypto is just getting slaughtered. The only explanation I can think of is we're getting fucked now that CME crypto futures are legal. But without any actual data that's probably just cope

62305385
it's over

62306031
>>62305363
I had an asset do 200% in like 7 days recently, so it seems at least that people aren't turning up their noses at it all, so long as substantial developments are being made. Still not immune to dipping after considering profit-taking. Good projects can stand out in a storm like a lighthouse does. We'll see if that continues into the year.

62306711
>>62306031
Oh, I don't think crypto's over at all, unless someone has cracked SHA-256. Something is definitely happening to the asset class, though. A pro-crypto Fed chair just took over, stocks are up, but our internet coins are acting like they're about to be banned (for the tenth time)

62308784
Bump

62308863
>>62285441
You can trade at mexc and make maker orders close to the current price, that way only the taker pays 0.4-5% and you lose nothing.

62309487
>>62306031
Consistency is key.

62310796
>>62308784
I think we're fully in a news-driven cycle now, or maybe more accurately a institutional-crime-driven cycle. Physics-liquidity has no edge rn.
I'm working on this seasonality model which has caught some pivots so far, and if it's right we trend down to mid-June and then pump hard through the summer, but it's extremely experimental and I'll need months more results to compare to predictions before I could even start tuning it

62310807
>>62310796
it could also be the observer effect has broken your model

62310837
>>62310807
>the observer effect has broken your model
If Saylor's found my model he could at least send me a couple shekels
That said, about 95 times out of 100 a physics-predicted pivot that happens on a weekend gets frontrun the last trading day before, which does make me suspect institutions also figured this out

item.title: you silly basterds think btc is down because of saylor man wait until normcattle hear about quantum fud on steroids >Goo… — 11 replies — 44.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
you silly basterds think btc is down because of saylor man wait until normcattle hear about quantum fud on steroids >Goo…

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-06-03 18:52 UTC

OP

you silly basterds think btc is down because of saylor man
wait until normcattle hear about quantum fud on steroids

>Google cracked Shor's algorithm for secp256k1 (the curve securing btc keys)
>hid the details behind a ZK proof at US government request
>a french reverse-engineered it in two months
>cryptographic qday by 2032

[Submitted on 1 Jun 2026]
Optimized Point Addition Circuits for Elliptic Curve Discrete Logarithms
André Schrottenloher
https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02235

start sweating bitches

Early replies (first 3)

62306885
>>62306854
bip360. problem solved

62306909
also, he reverse-engineered it 10% better
and vibeGODS are VIBING it even better now
it's the ultimate humiliation

62307046
>>62306854
they said in that same paper that Mochimo already solved it, but also brought up QRL which is a scamcoin that Coinmarketcap CEO called out and had de-tracked due to inflated valuation. Both are supposedly quantum proof. I bought some MCM just in case. Qday is real.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62307066
>>62306854
>Saylor knew it
Is that why he sold only 0.0038% of this stash?

62308190
>>62306909
>vibeGODS
peasants who don't own AI
in a few years it will be:
legacy biomass that isn't AI

62308352
>>62306854
I'll explain cause somehow even among cryptofags there aren't any compsci people here...
"Cracking" the algorithm here actually means just halving the power of operations required to solve it. If it's 256 bit, then it's 2 to the power of 256. In the very best case scenario here, that goes to 2 to the power of 128 on a quantum processor. You will need many million times all of the current quantum processing power in the world right now to crack a single one in years, and these are extremely difficult to manufacture.

The real chokepoint for quantum computing for like 15 years now is that they just cannot make them large enough, not by a long shot. If they somehow had a breakthrough and were able to make a quantum processor 10 times as large (in terms of qubits) as the current world record, we'd still need to have like 3 more breakthroughs like that to even approach the possibility of craching a single 256 bit key.

62308570
>>62308352
The feds will make it happen by 2040. They can't stand us little piggies being able to hide things from them. Soon to fly domestically they will require a DNA sample which will be used to decide your fate during the great cull. Buy PLTR to influence your odds.

62308578
>quanum fud
literally sci fi teir fantasy nonsense lmao

62310779
>>62306854
>quantum breakaway is here !1!1!1!
>btc is fucked reee
>stocks make ath
illiterate niggers cant understand that when quantum computing is finally a reality everything goes to shit not only crapto

62310828
>>62306854
Release ze quantum fud

62310842
>Can crack any encryption on the planet
>LMAO BITCOINS IN TROUBLE
it's too easy to see through these retard posts

62310696

62310720

do narcist scammers age prematurely or what is going on here? cant he afford decent foods and health routines with the hundred million he plundered from redditors over the years?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62310725
>>62310696
Yes, because as you can see, he's trying to flap his wings like a fat chicken to run away with the cardakeks' money.

62310733
>>62310631
I respect him more after this honestly. Retail is stone cold fucking retarded. He tried to implement the governance model that Cardano needs to be more proactive and they fucked him. Now he has all the permission he needs to go be a billionaire.

62310744
>>62310631
cardatroons in suicide watch kek

62310752
Link https://x.com/Pledditor/status/2062207746770927641

It's actually just full captiulation, I'd almost feel sorry for this nigger if he didn't take a whole lot of gullible retards with him. I had a friend 36, who got divorce raped with a daughter and all inned ADA saying they were going to save rainforests

62310804
>>62310752
>they were going to save rainforests
>believing such blatant boomerfag lies
he deserved everything he got and more

62310817
he looks like he is losing a lot of money. Feel bad for the guy desu.

62310825
>>62310631
what went wrong?

62310826
>>62310817
he's not in his gay ram skull room, did he have to downsize?

62310523

item.title: HYPE weathered the storm, and is prepping for a parabolic rise in the weeks to come. — 19 replies — 32.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
HYPE weathered the storm, and is prepping for a parabolic rise in the weeks to come.

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-06-03 18:19 UTC

OP

HYPE weathered the storm, and is prepping for a parabolic rise in the weeks to come.

Early replies (first 3)

62309289
CZ lost

62309402
>>62309274
I used times ten leverage (x10) to buy one hundred (100) Hyperliquid coins (ticker: HYPE). My hyperliquidation price is sixty-six dot six-one-one (66.611) Circle american dollar tokens (USDC). Am I (anon) going to make it?

62309411
>>62309402
Idk what to say to you anon... just sell before 12th

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62309448
>>62309411
Y-you're scaring me anon... what is going to happen on the twelfth (12th)?

62309452
>>62309448
i think this is nano anon, he says nano will replace USD by musk around the 12th

62309478
>>62309402
you'll be fine, if it didn't hit $66 yesterday it wont ever again, we're only up from here.

62309516
>>62309478
>we're only up from here.

top signal

62309533
>>62309411
SAAR SELL BY 12TH SAAR

>>62309516
Bitcoin dropped like 10% and hype is gapping back to 75
I honestly hope this piece of shit goes on a generational run to 1 trillion lol
If only I had gone all in

62309546
lol just noticed bitcoin is actually down 20% from where it was 1 month ago

62309579
>>62309274
Hype will lose desu
CZ still has many tricks up his sleeve. We're talking about someone with absolutely 0 morals and unlimited monies.
He'll nuke BTC to 0 before conceding and listing Hype on binance. I think he may even go as far as to hire assassins to go after the Hype CEO in Singapore.
Or team up with Trump/Jews to regulate hype out of existence.
The good news is that the Hype ceo is also chinese so he knows what evil chinks like CZ are capable of, that's why he hired multiple 24/7 bodyguards.
But if CZ can take down SBF he can take down hype.
Nothing is off the table when it comes to this evil chink

62309691
>>62309579
Then why hasn't he done it already?

62309717
>>62309691
He already tried. And failed. ASTER.

62309797
>>62309691
October 10th was just a warning shot and it almost completely killed crypto.
Don't forget that he bought his presidential pardon directly with Trump, and he still has $100B to buy other "favors", while Jeff barely has 8 figs to his name. Money rules the world.

62310458
>>62309797
warning shot? that was his goku spirit bomb he charged up for 8 years. That nigga is cooked

62310496
>>62309579
the recipe is the same as always, he boat a shitload of hype, he will list it and it will never pump again, same thing happened with silver at 75 and oil at around 100

62310499
>>62309478
ok haha yay!

62310534
>>62309691
He's tried multiple times already via onchain attacks
>JELLY JELLY manipulation
>Aster
>slandering Hype by posting an old photo of him and that he was rejected by CZs fund
Now comes the physical attack vectors which nobody knows yet but its undoubtedly SBF-tier. CZ has been quiet this entire time as well.
>>62310496
He's never listing hype, it would be an unequivocal surrender and massive humiliation ritual for him to list a 2 year old coin that is Top 10 by mcap. Hype team is never handing a singular token to him as well, he'd need to buy on the open market further adding to the humiliation. Never happening

62310639
>>62310534
Honestly the fact that crypto is being held hostage by scammers like this (both CZ and Hype) is why any normal person should be extremely bearish on the asset class for the forseeable future. There is no money to be made for regular people here, let the scammers continue to fight in the mud.

62310661
>>62310639
>hyperliquid not taking vc money and doing the biggest airdrop of all time is the reason why my goyalt is -97%
Skill issue unironically

item.title: HOLY. FUCK. — 44 replies — 20.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
HOLY. FUCK.

Open thread • Replies: 44 • Updated: 2026-06-03 16:47 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62301820
@grok is this legal?

62301873
>>62301796
iirc I don't think the wash sale rule applies to crypto yet, so yes you can if that is true. You might get in trouble if your dealing with a significant sum though or like sell enough to deduct your entire taxable income and your job isn't a Mcwage job, the IRS has a catch-22 called the economic substance doctrine where they could argue that you were trying to fleece them in an audit or court proceeding.

62301881
There are actively managed funds that intentionally do stuff like this to get you tax breaks every year.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62302609
>>62301884
You can deduct up to 3000 dollars a year in capital losses from your earned income

62302619
>>62301796
And then when you sell it at 100k at a real loss of 26k you have to pay taxes on fake capital gains of 11k.
Fucking idiot

62302625
Creative account hack

62302635
Illegal in my country.

62302646
>>62301905
in germany it's legal.

62302875
Yes and I do this but I'm in the UK so you have to wait 30 days to buy back (bed & breakfast rule), or you can swap it to another token like WBTC.

62303255
>>62301796
False. the us gov only accepts 3k in losses per year.

62303270
>>62301884
Wrong, I've taken the max deduction every single year for the past 5 years because I blow at trading

62303329
>>62301796
You can do this assuming the investment isn’t subject to wash sale rules. You can also swap between bitcoin ETFs that aren’t considered substantially identical. However doing this is going to make your cost basis much lower so when you sell in the future at a profit, you’ll have higher levels of taxable gains.

62303351
>>62303255
You can harvest unlimited losses to offset capital gains. If you sell stock A at a 5 mil profit and sell stock B at a 3 mil loss, you’ll only have 2 mil in taxable gains that year. The 3k limit only applies to lowering MAGI.

62303503
>people on /biz/ dont understand how capital gains taxes work
jesus christ guys get it together

62303568
>>62303270
based

62303876
>>62301905
There is no wash sales on crypto because its not a security, its classified as "property". That said its still not good to take losses. Making 10k is always better than losing 10k even if it lets you defer taxes on other earnings.

62303887
>>62303351
It has to be the same type of capital loss and gains though. You can't offset short term loss against long term gains.

62303938
>>62302190
correct, and you carry over anything not used to the next year

62304466
>>62303503
Why should we learn about a tax that we will never get to pay?

62304653
>>62303887
Look how confident this utter retard is. Lot of retards in here though excluding a couple anons.
It initially applies directly to the same type of capital gain/loss (short/long term). I’ll just give an example cause it’s harder to type out and explain it simply.

let’s say you
>realize a loss of 15k in a short term trade in Feb of 2026
>in April, you close another short term trade and realize a gain of $2500 in April.
>That puts you at -12500 on the year so far. Short for short, straightforward and as expected.
>You make no more sales of short term holdings for the rest of the year.
>in November, you sell a long term position and profit 9500 ltcg.
->since you have no more short term gains to cancel out, you can apply it to your long term gain
>you would end up net -3k on the year which you can then deduct from you MAGI
And ideally if you’re really scheming and planning, you obviously don’t want to realize a long term capital gain to cut down on a realized short term loss. It’s possible in incorrect about that last sentence. I won’t be smug like the brainlet I replied to. From my understanding you can’t just defer that long term realized gain

Here’s somethin I was thinking about as a possible plan I was contemplating (although I am aware about it carrying forward and I could use my “loss Bank” later in the future) , I have 19k in realized losses short from being a Stink marine already this year. I have long term precious metals, which are taxed at a rate of 28% on long term holds. I could realize my profits and sell some early gold bars that I got for low 2k as well as silver at 30, and use those short term losses to completely cancel out my realized profits in PMs 1:1.

62304666
>>62301796
>henlo IRS I losted $37,000 and want a refund
>yes I can hold

62304690
>>62304653
And obviously, same thing applies with long term realized losses, if you have no long term gains to cancel out for that year, it can be applied to the short term gains, but Im pretty certain it isn’t at a 1:1 like that PM based legal loophole. Maybe a percentage based off your cap gains rate and your tax bracket for the year if I recall

62304719
>>62302619
kek

62304792
>>62301796
..............

62305421
>>62301931
>wont be able to buy illicit goods anymore though
Sure you can, after 30 days.

62305550
>>62301820
It would be illegal if it was anything other than bitcoin.

62305573
>>62301796
Who the fuck is stupid enough to declare their crypto savings to the taxman?

62305634
>>62301820
Yeah, you sell the BTC to take the loss at the end of the year and then buy something like IBIT until the year rolls over then hold IBIT for year and repeat. If you really need the BTC you could just rebuy the BTC after Jan 1

62305652
>>62301796
That's the stated reason for Strategy's selling

62308022
>>62301796
that's a cool trick but unfortunately it also involves being retarded enough to buy at 126k

62308032
>>62305652
what gains do they have to offset though?

62308136
Good advice, except for the "buying it back" part.

62310108
>>62301796
this is your brain on the bitcoin diet

item.title: I’m looking to start a pineapple spear business out of my trunk in the Winchester Park, PA area. — 7 replies — 20.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
I’m looking to start a pineapple spear business out of my trunk in the Winchester Park, PA area.

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-06-03 18:34 UTC

OP

I’m looking to start a pineapple spear business out of my trunk in the Winchester Park, PA area. Does /biz/ have any advice for me? I have a budget of around $12k and a car already.

Early replies (first 3)

62307604
>>62307586
so what you do is go talk to the FDA about your pineapple spear food safety plan. If they don't arrest you on a mental health hold, you're golden.

62307610
>>62307604
Nobody on ig goes through the fda and they’re thriving I’ll just be smart and lowkey

62307614
>>62307610
loose lips sink ships

you told /biz/ and /biz/ don't keep secrets for you or anyone

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62307627
>>62307614
Bet

62307967
>>62307586
add i theanine, caffiene, and alpha gpc powder
the sugar will mask it
there, thats your alpha over the other apes

maybe just flavored preworkout

62310707
>>62307967
Wouldn't CDP-Choline be better for slower and longer onset if You plan on using it during the day? Maybe add piperine and huperzine A to boost previous substances? Just don't drink it at night.

62310742
>>62307604
There are ways around it.
Set up a patreon people donate and they get a free jar of pineapple Kool aid
Thereby circumventing the law.

62308009

62308063

62308070

62308154

62308158

62308161

62308166

62308172
>>62308166

62308184
>>62308172
take your meds

62308232
>>62308158
That's not even a conspiracy theory. How much of a bootlicker are you?

62308328

62309634
>>62309527
That will probably work. In two years or so, when the mass unemployment is everywhere, careers destroyed, they will let you off the hook to pacify you long enough, pic related. Your children will be lab rats at best.

62309663
>>62309527
I owe like £70,000 and I fully intend to emigrate then stop paying it back.

62309938
>>62309527
Lol they'll just garnish your wages. You're acting like you have a choice.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62309989
>>62309527
Why do you have loans in the first place?

62310285
It is unforgivable loans.
Your kids would inherit the amount you owe.
You better to not breed.

62310315
I didnt go to college was gonna be real mad if they forgave loans

62310330
>>62309663
This. They are never seeing that money again.

62310369
>>62310285
Mine get forgiven in 2043 on IBR.

62310421
>>62309938
>wages

62310547
>>62309527
already had a decade of not paying due to forbearrance. i can just take 2 online community college classes every other semester for a few more years, then when i can afford to live off dividends, the income based plan will have me payin zero until they are forgiven. that's the nice thing about those covered call funds from goldman, shit is 90% tax free ROC for like 10 years while youre collecting 8% yield.

62310549
i literally haven’t paid a cent in 10 years other than the $17 garnished from my paycheck right before covid lockdowns 5 years ago

item.title: I'm so fucking bored of my job and life. — 10 replies — 6.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
I'm so fucking bored of my job and life.

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-06-03 17:21 UTC

OP

I'm so fucking bored of my job and life. I'm only just about in six figure purgatory. I have a boring low responsibility overpaid work from home job, zero social life, and live in a boring city.

I could move to London for a sideways move and slightly better work experience but I'd have to live in a shithole apartment. And I saw a YouTube video recently of "drill rappers" in a music video in London and I don't think I can take the idea of moving to London and having to pay council tax that pays for their subsidised social housing. I'm at a career dead end and I will probably never get out of it.

I have no easy path to make it. I'm too ugly for social media stuff. I missed out on early crypto. AI has lots of supergeniuses in it and it's getting easier every month for pure software businesses to replicate each other.

And living in the UK feels more subhuman than ever when the government has no purpose other than importing the third world, taking money from law abiding people and giving it to parasites and illegal immigrants, and literally implementing degrowth as a policy agenda. I'm blackpilled by social media / internet depictions of the USA, but in a very rational way. The UK feels so parochial. I am 100% alienated from the entire culture.

It feels like all of life success boils down to either being on the traditional elite career path at a young age or social media marketing.

I'm in my mid 30s. It's fucking over. I looked at the weather forecast in San Francisco and realised how big of a joke my existence is.

Early replies (first 3)

62310055
>>62310048
didnt read dont care

62310062
>>62310048
just kill yourself and be done with all this shit anon. This is the ultimate red pill.
>NOOOOOOOOO I DESESPERATLY HAVE TO CLING TO LIFE BECAUSE YAWHVE SAID SO!
Ok keep suffering then nigger

62310066
>>62310055
fuck off faggot this is a soul post and i read every word.

die normalnigger

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62310078
>>62310066
it's a generic demoralization post, i dont care

62310088
>>62310048
>be british
found your problem, faggot

62310181
>>62310048
Stop bitching and just don’t give a shit max. I ask out women who are strangers and get dates and fuck high end prostitutes as a cope if the date doesn’t go well, I don’t get nervous at all anymore or care about embarrassment or rejection after not giving a shit max. I am early 30s and was a doomer and upset about missing out on my 20s but at end of day, it is what it is and no point in dwelling in the past. Just focus on moving forward and do whatever it is that will ensure gives you best chances at meeting your goals and just ignore your insecurities.

62310193
>>62310181

I don't live in South America. This shit doesn't work.

62310209
>>62310066
It's literally spam that gets posted once a month

62310312
>>62310181
this bro knows. just cold approach as it is a game of averages. do partial fills at 10 gas stations around a nice part of the city and commit to approaching 1 chick each time. sooner or later you will convert and that pussy gonna be pounding yoru dick

62310326
>>62310312
>having sex with cagie goyim
is this bait or are you really that nasty
